name: Academic Writer Pipeline
description: Multi-agent article writing pipeline with granular per-paragraph skill tracking: load_profile → deep_read → thesis_proposal → outline → per-section (per-paragraph: draft → hebrew_grammar → repetition_check → citation_audit) → synthesize → docx_output

load_profile.name: Load Profile
load_profile.description: Load researcher profile and tool configuration

source_selection.name: Source Selection
source_selection.description: Researcher selects which sources to use

deep_read.name: Deep Read
deep_read.description: Deep reader agent queries RAG to map source coverage

outline.name: Outline Generation
outline.description: Architect agent generates structured article outline

ingestion_sync.name: Ingestion Sync
ingestion_sync.description: Ensure selected sources are indexed in RAG

section_{N}.name: Section {N}: {title}
section_{N}.description: Write all paragraphs for section N

section_{N}_p_{M}_draft.name: Draft paragraph {M}
section_{N}_p_{M}_draft.description: Query RAG and write paragraph applying style fingerprint

section_{N}_p_{M}_hebrew_grammar.name: Hebrew grammar check — paragraph {M}
section_{N}_p_{M}_hebrew_grammar.description: Verify Hebrew grammar, spelling, and academic register

section_{N}_p_{M}_repetition_check.name: Repetition check — paragraph {M}
section_{N}_p_{M}_repetition_check.description: Check for repeated words, phrases, arguments across paragraph and prior text

section_{N}_p_{M}_citation_audit.name: Citation audit — paragraph {M}
section_{N}_p_{M}_citation_audit.description: Auditor agent verifies every citation via RAG bypass + Candlekeep

synthesize.name: Synthesis
synthesize.description: Synthesizer agent reviews coherence, flow, style, and cross-section repetition

synthesize_repetition_check.name: Full-article repetition check
synthesize_repetition_check.description: Final pass checking for repeated arguments or phrases across all sections

docx_output.name: DOCX Output
docx_output.description: Generate final .docx file with footnotes and bibliography
